content.query:
use nyc_taxi_discovery;

select
    * 
from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'raw/calendar.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
    FORMAT = 'csv',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW = true
) as cal;

exec sp_describe_first_result_set N'
select
    * 
from OPENROWSET(
    BULK ''raw/calendar.csv'',
    DATA_SOURCE = ''nyc_taxi_data'',
    FORMAT = ''csv'',
    PARSER_VERSION = ''2.0'',
    HEADER_ROW = true
) as cal
'

select
    * 
from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'raw/calendar.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
    FORMAT = 'csv',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW = true
) with (
    date_key int,
    date date,
    year smallint,
    month tinyint,
    day tinyint,
    day_name varchar(10),
    day_of_year smallint,
    week_of_month tinyint,
    week_of_year tinyint,
    month_name varchar(10),
    year_month int,
    year_week int
)as cal;
